Household Cleaning Concentrates.name: Black Phenyl Concentrate
Household Cleaning Concentrates.short_description:
A highly effective disinfectant solution widely used for cleaning and sanitizing purposes. Known for its strong germicidal properties, it is commonly diluted to prepare black phenyl, which is used in households, hospitals, and industrial facilities for surface disinfection and odor control.



ENQUIRE NOW


Key Features

 	Broad-Spectrum Disinfection: Effective against bacteria, fungi, and viruses.
 	Odor Control: Neutralizes unpleasant smells.
 	Emulsifiable Concentrate: Easily mixes with water to form a stable solution.
 	Versatility: Suitable for a wide range of cleaning applications.

attributes.Appearance: Dark brown to black viscous liquid
attributes.Solubility: Forms a stable emulsion when diluted in water
